sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44775" key="eu)phci/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπηξία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">εὔπηκτος</etym>) <sense id="n44775.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compactness</tr_>, [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τραχήλου</foreign>] <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
